---
output: html_document
fontsize: 40pt
---

<link rel="stylesheet" href="styles.css" type="text/css">

<br>

<b>Come see me at VSS 2020 to hear more about understanding social causality with videos like the one shown below!</b>

<iframe width="704" height="396" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/GWxFReQnsOg" frameborder="0" allowfullscreen></iframe>
